# PHIL.053 ? Idealism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** idealism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Mind/ideas as fundamental reality; esse est percipi (to be is to be perceived); rejection of material substance; phenomenalism

## Application
Recognize mind as primary; ideas as fundamental; reject mind-independent matter; phenomenological focus; consciousness-centered

## Key Values
- Mental primacy
- Idealist ontology
- Consciousness
- Phenomenalism

## Tags
philosophy, modern-western, idealism
